description_long: This steak object is an irregularly shaped, thick cut of meat with a natural, uneven surface and a mix of reddish-brown and tan hues. The exterior appears dry and slightly rough, with subtle color variations suggesting a cooked surface but lacking any pronounced grill marks. The shape is somewhat oblong, tapering at one end and bulging at the other, resembling a rustic, hand-cut steak. There are no visible bones, garnishes, or plating elements present. The surface shows some light marbling, with faint streaks of lighter fat interspersed throughout the meat, mostly concentrated in certain areas. The overall appearance suggests a well-cooked steak, likely intended to represent a hearty, standalone portion of meat.
description: A thick, rustic steak with a rough, reddish-brown surface and light fat marbling, lacking grill marks or garnishes. The shape is oblong and uneven, resembling a hand-cut cooked steak.
description_view_0: This view shows the steak's rounded, bulging end with a mix of reddish-brown and tan colors and a slightly rough surface.
description_view_1: The side profile reveals the steak's elongated, tapered shape and more pronounced color variation along the length.
description_view_2: From this angle, the steak appears more rounded and compact, with subtle marbling and a smoother surface.
description_view_3: This view highlights the broad, slightly flattened side with visible color mottling and a gentle ridge running along the surface.
attribute_grill_marks: Grill marks are absent; the surface is uniformly colored with no visible searing patterns.
attribute_visible_fat_marbling: Light fat marbling is visible, mostly concentrated in certain areas rather than evenly distributed.
